# RC-08: Risk & Health Monitoring

**Track:** Risk Controls (`RC`) · **Priority:** SHOULD (recommended) · **Status:** draft

Continuously monitor the system's operational risk posture: configuration drift against approved baseline, new vulnerabilities in the SBOM, threat landscape changes, application health indicators, capacity trends, TLS certificate expiry, and dependency health. Escalate when risk thresholds are crossed.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 6 | Observability & Maintenance | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Automated with human escalation |
| **Agent does** | Continuously monitor all risk and health indicators; detect drift, vulnerabilities, and capacity risks; alert on threshold breaches. |
| **Human does** | Respond to escalations; make decisions on risk acceptance or remediation; initiate feedback loops. |

## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Risk & health monitoring record | evidence | Continuous record of all monitored risk indicators with threshold breach events. | 7 years (DORA) |
| Risk escalation alert | alert | Alert when any monitored risk indicator exceeds its defined threshold. |  |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | continuous |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | escalate |
| **Escalate to** | Risk Officer |

Threshold breaches escalate to Risk Officer. Critical risks may trigger emergency feedback loop.

## Dependencies

None

## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(2) | Continuous identification and assessment of ICT risk including vulnerability management |
| DORA | Art. 10 | Detection of anomalous activities and potential ICT vulnerabilities |
| EU AI Act | Art. 9(1) | Continuous and iterative risk management process throughout the AI system lifecycle |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Risk Management / SRE · **Owner role:** Risk Officer
